channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: militarized ocp
item.description: विस्तारः (द्रष्टुं नोद्यम्) Vijay Kumar, editor of the Indian Journal of Archaeology compares the Indus Valley Civilization (IVC) and the Ochre Coloured Pottery (OCP) culture to - the Athenians and Spartans. OCP sites were small, mobile and heavily militarized - weapons, weapons & weapons Indian Journal of Archaeology, Vol. 7, No 2, (2022), Pages 207-305 Militarized OCP settlement: When we compare OCP culture with Harappans, we find a great difference in material culture.
